subject: [PATCH 1/4] arm64: request contpte-sized folios for exec memory

2026-03-10.patch_summary: The patch modifies the exec_folio_order() function to request contpte-sized folios for executable memory on arm64 architectures. This change aims to optimize page cache allocation by taking into account the hardware's ability to coalesce contiguous PTEs, resulting in fewer iTLB entries.
